t: Do I Need a License to Run My Business Here in the USA? | JK Accounting Group Skip to the check JK Accounting GroupTAX · BOOKKEEPING · CFO Book a free call Free check · 1 minute Do I need a license to run my business here in the USA? Many new owners do not know that a local license is required to operate. See if you need one, roughly what it costs, and when it is due. By JK Accounting Group · Miami & Fort Lauderdale Built with JuliaFounder · speaks your language Check your business Two quick questions. Nothing is saved and no email is needed. Where is your business? Choose one… Broward County (Fort Lauderdale, Hollywood, nearby) Miami-Dade County (Miami and nearby) Somewhere else in Florida Outside Florida Please choose where your business is. What kind of business is it? Choose the closest one… Store / retail Restaurant / food Service / office / consulting Construction / contractor Salon / beauty Online / ecommerce Something else Please choose the closest type. Check my business Takes about a minute. Your result Rough first-year cost $120 – $170 City and county together. The exact fee depends on your business. Renew every year by Sept 30 The license runs Oct 1 to Sept 30 each year. Let us get your license — book a free call → A 20‑minute call. No cost, no pressure. What to know In plain words, so nothing is missed. In Florida it is called a Business Tax Receipt. It is the local license that lets you legally operate. Most businesses need one, even small and home-based ones. You often need two — county and city. They are separate offices with separate fees. One does not cover the other. The order matters, and getting the category right sets the price. Some businesses need a state license too. Restaurants, salons, and contractors, for example. The city will not issue your local license until that state license is in hand. Hi, I'm Julia. Founder, JK Accounting GroupEnglish · Russian · Ukrainian We do these filings all the time here in Miami and Fort Lauderdale. We know the county and city steps, the right category, and the small details that hold applications up. This check gives you the quick answer. When you are ready, we can take the whole thing off your plate. Want us to handle the whole thing? Send us your details and we will get your license sorted — in English, Russian, or Ukrainian. Or book a free 20‑minute call. We file the county and city applications for you. We pick the right category so the fee is correct. A real person who speaks your language. Prefer WhatsApp? Message us here Your name * Email * Phone or WhatsApp Optional. We will use whatever is easiest for you. Best language for you English Russian Ukrainian Send my details Or book a call now Start your business on the right side of the rules. We get your local license sorted, correctly and on time — clearly, in your language. Book a free call → See our other free tools Miami · Fort Lauderdale · Online General information, not legal or tax advice. This check is a simple guide. The exact license, fee, and steps depend on your business and address. Costs shown are rough and change by category and city. Please talk to us to confirm what you need. JK Accounting GroupTAX · BOOKKEEPING · CFO Miami · Fort Lauderdale · Online Bookkeeping · Taxes · CFO — in English, Russian & Ukrainian Book a free call // (function () { "use strict"; // Florida local Business Tax Receipt — see TAX-FIGURES-TO-VERIFY.md var REGULATED = { food: true, construction: true, salon: true }; var TYPE_LABEL = { food: "food or a restaurant", construction: "construction", salon: "a salon or beauty business" }; var form = document.getElementById("calc"); var result = document.getElementById("result"); var fArea = document.getElementById("f-area"); var fType = document.getElementById("f-type"); var compare = document.getElementById("r-compare"); form.addEventListener("submit", function (e) { e.preventDefault(); var area = document.getElementById("area").value; var type = document.getElementById("type").value; var ok = true; fArea.classList.remove("invalid"); fType.classList.remove("invalid"); if (!area) { fArea.classList.add("invalid"); ok = false; } if (!type) { fType.classList.add("invalid"); ok = false; } if (!ok) { result.hidden = true; return; } var headline = document.getElementById("r-headline"); var explain = document.getElementById("r-explain"); var note = document.getElementById("r-note"); headline.classList.remove("warn"); var regNote = REGULATED[type] ? " Because your business is " + TYPE_LABEL[type] + ", you also likely need a state license first — the city will not issue your local one until you have it." : ""; if (area === "outside_fl") { compare.style.display = "none"; headline.innerHTML = "Most US cities require a local business license."; explain.textContent = "We are based in Florida and know the Miami and Fort Lauderdale rules in detail. Outside Florida the name and cost are different, but a local license is usually still required before you operate." + regNote; note.innerHTML = "Let's point you the right way. Tell us your city and business, and we will tell you exactly what you need."; LM.showResult(result); return; } compare.style.display = ""; headline.innerHTML = 'Yes — you almost certainly need a local business license.'; var where; if (area === "broward") where = "In Broward County you usually get the county receipt first, then your city one (for example Fort Lauderdale or Hollywood)."; else if (area === "miamidade") where = "In Miami-Dade you usually need the county receipt, plus your city one if your city requires it."; else where = "In Florida you usually need one from your county, and often one from your city too."; explain.textContent = "In Florida this is called a Business Tax Receipt — the local license that lets you legally operate. " + where + regNote; note.innerHTML = "The details decide the price. The right category, the right order, and any state license all matter. We handle the whole filing so it is done correctly the first time."; LM.showResult(result); }); })(); //
